---
title: "People — 2025"
---

## Speakers

**Howard Tealeaf** — Australian National University
: Works on the limits of mechanistic explanation in the life sciences.
  {{< lipsum 1 >}}

**Sofia Marchetti** — University of Bologna
: Studies biological function and the legacy of teleological language.
  {{< lipsum 1 >}}

**Wei Chen** — National University of Singapore
: Models developmental modularity and its discontents.
  {{< lipsum 1 >}}

**Aroha Tipene** — University of Auckland
: Interested in robustness, canalisation, and what they explain.
  {{< lipsum 1 >}}

## Organisers

**Gregor Halvorsen** — University of Melbourne (chair)
: {{< lipsum 1 >}}

**Lucia Fernández** — Monash University
: {{< lipsum 1 >}}
